```
[map[explanation:Add category selection and custom name functionality filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout_web/live/pricelist_live/printable.ex newString:defmodule CozyCheckoutWeb.PricelistLive.Printable do
  use CozyCheckoutWeb, :live_view

  alias CozyCheckout.Catalog

  @impl true
  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    categories = Catalog.list_categories()
    all_category_ids = Enum.map(categories, & &1.id)
    
    pricelists_by_category = Catalog.get_active_pricelists_for_print(all_category_ids)

    {:ok,
     socket
     |> assign(:page_title, "Ceník")
     |> assign(:categories, categories)
     |> assign(:selected_category_ids, all_category_ids)
     |> assign(:pricelist_name, "Ceník")
     |> assign(:pricelists_by_category, pricelists_by_category)
     |> assign(:generated_at, Date.utc_today())}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("print", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_event(socket, "print", %{})}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("toggle_category", %{"category-id" => category_id}, socket) do
    category_id = String.to_integer(category_id)
    
    selected_ids =
      if category_id in socket.assigns.selected_category_ids do
        List.delete(socket.assigns.selected_category_ids, category_id)
      else
        [category_id | socket.assigns.selected_category_ids]
      end
    
    pricelists_by_category = Catalog.get_active_pricelists_for_print(selected_ids)
    
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:selected_category_ids, selected_ids)
     |> assign(:pricelists_by_category, pricelists_by_category)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("toggle_all", _params, socket) do
    all_category_ids = Enum.map(socket.assigns.categories, & &1.id)
    
    selected_ids =
      if length(socket.assigns.selected_category_ids) == length(all_category_ids) do
        []
      else
        all_category_ids
      end
    
    pricelists_by_category = Catalog.get_active_pricelists_for_print(selected_ids)
    
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:selected_category_ids, selected_ids)
     |> assign(:pricelists_by_category, pricelists_by_category)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("update_name", %{"name" => name}, socket) do
    {:noreply, assign(socket, :pricelist_name, name)}
  end
end oldString:defmodule CozyCheckoutWeb.PricelistLive.Printable do
  use CozyCheckoutWeb, :live_view

  alias CozyCheckout.Catalog

  @impl true
  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    pricelists_by_category = Catalog.get_active_pricelists_for_print()

    {:ok,
     socket
     |> assign(:page_title, "Ceník")
     |> assign(:pricelists_by_category, pricelists_by_category)
     |> assign(:generated_at, Date.utc_today())}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("print", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_event(socket, "print", %{})}
  end
end] map[explanation:Update get_active_pricelists_for_print to filter by category IDs filePath:/Users/michalhorcic/projects/ELIXIR/cozy_checkout/lib/cozy_checkout/catalog.ex newString:  @doc """
  Gets all active pricelists grouped by category for printing.
  Only includes pricelists that are active and valid for today.
  Returns a list of {category, products_with_pricelists} tuples.
  
  ## Parameters
  - category_ids: List of category IDs to filter by (if empty, returns empty list)
  - date: The date to check validity against (defaults to today)
  """
  def get_active_pricelists_for_print(category_ids, date \\ Date.utc_today()) do
    # Return empty if no categories selected
    if category_ids == [] do
      []
    else
      # Get all active pricelists valid for the given date
      pricelists =
        Pricelist
        |> where([p], is_nil(p.deleted_at))
        |> where([p], p.active == true)
        |> where([p], p.valid_from <= ^date)
        |> where([p], is_nil(p.valid_to) or p.valid_to >= ^date)
        |> preload([p], product: :category)
        |> order_by([p], desc: p.valid_from)
        |> Repo.all()

      # Group by product (take most recent pricelist per product)
      pricelists_by_product =
        pricelists
        |> Enum.group_by(& &1.product_id)
        |> Enum.map(fn {_product_id, pricelists} ->
          # Take the most recent pricelist for this product
          List.first(pricelists)
        end)
        |> Enum.filter(&(&1.product != nil))
        |> Enum.filter(&(&1.product.active == true))
        |> Enum.filter(fn pricelist ->
          # Filter by selected categories
          pricelist.product.category_id in category_ids
        end)

      # Group by category
      pricelists_by_product
      |> Enum.group_by(& &1.product.category)
      |> Enum.sort_by(fn {category, _} ->
        if category do
          {category.order, category.name}
        else
          {999_999, ""}
        end
      end)
      |> Enum.map(fn {category, pricelists} ->
        # Sort products alphabetically with Czech collation support
        sorted_pricelists =
          Enum.sort(pricelists, &compare_czech_names(&1.product.name, &2.product.name))

        {category, sorted_pricelists}
      end)
    end
  end oldString:  @doc """
  Gets all active pricelists grouped by category for printing.
  Only includes pricelists that are active and valid for today.
  Returns a list of {category, products_with_pricelists} tuples.
  """
  def get_active_pricelists_for_print(date \\ Date.utc_today()) do
    # Get all active pricelists valid for the given date
    pricelists =
      Pricelist
      |> where([p], is_nil(p.deleted_at))
      |> where([p], p.active == true)
      |> where([p], p.valid_from <= ^date)
      |> where([p], is_nil(p.valid_to) or p.valid_to >= ^date)
      |> preload([p], product: :category)
      |> order_by([p], desc: p.valid_from)
      |> Repo.all()

    # Group by product (take most recent pricelist per product)
    pricelists_by_product =
      pricelists
      |> Enum.group_by(& &1.product_id)
      |> Enum.map(fn {_product_id, pricelists} ->
        # Take the most recent pricelist for this product
        List.first(pricelists)
      end)
      |> Enum.filter(&(&1.product != nil))
      |> Enum.filter(&(&1.product.active == true))

    # Group by category
    pricelists_by_product
    |> Enum.group_by(& &1.product.category)
    |> Enum.sort_by(fn {category, _} ->
      if category do
        {category.order, category.name}
      else
        {999_999, ""}
      end
    end)
    |> Enum.map(fn {category, pricelists} ->
      # Sort products alphabetically with Czech collation support
      sorted_pricelists =
        Enum.sort(pricelists, &compare_czech_names(&1.product.name, &2.product.name))

      {category, sorted_pricelists}
    end)
  end]]
```

- newString:

```
  <%!-- Category Selection Panel (Hidden on print) --%>
  <div class="no-print bg-white border-b border-secondary-200 sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-sm">
    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4">
      <div class="flex items-start gap-6">
        <%!-- Custom Name Input --%>
        <div class="flex-1">
          <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-primary-500 mb-2">
            Název ceníku (volitelné)
          </label>
          <input
            type="text"
            name="pricelist_name"
            value={@pricelist_name}
            phx-change="update_name"
            placeholder="např. Vinný lístek, Destiláty..."
            class="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-secondary-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-tertiary-500 focus:border-tertiary-500"
          />
        </div>

        <%!-- Category Selection --%>
        <div class="flex-1">
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-primary-500">
              Vyberte kategorie
            </label>
            <button
              type="button"
              phx-click="toggle_all"
              class="text-xs text-tertiary-600 hover:text-tertiary-800 font-medium"
            >
              <%= if length(@selected_category_ids) == length(@categories) do %>
                Odznačit vše
              <% else %>
                Vybrat vše
              <% end %>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto border border-secondary-200 rounded-md p-3 bg-secondary-50">
            <%= for category <- @categories do %>
              <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-secondary-100 p-1 rounded">
                <input
                  type="checkbox"
                  phx-click="toggle_category"
                  phx-value-category-id={category.id}
                  checked={category.id in @selected_category_ids}
                  class="rounded border-secondary-300 text-tertiary-600 focus:ring-tertiary-500"
                />
                <span class="text-sm text-primary-500">{category.name}</span>
              </label>
            <% end %>
          </div>
        </div>

        <%!-- Print Button --%>
        <div class="flex items-end">
          <button
            phx-click="print"
            class="btn btn-primary gap-2 whitespace-nowrap"
            disabled={@selected_category_ids == []}
          >
            <.icon name="hero-printer" class="h-5 w-5" /> Vytisknout
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <%= if @selected_category_ids == [] do %>
        <div class="mt-3 text-sm text-amber-600 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-md px-3 py-2">
          <.icon name="hero-exclamation-triangle" class="h-4 w-4 inline mr-1" />
          Vyberte alespoň jednu kategorii pro tisk ceníku
        </div>
      <% end %>
    </div>
  </div>

  <%!-- Printable Content --%>
  <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">
    <%!-- Header --%>
    <div class="text-center mb-8">
      <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-primary-500 mb-1">Jindřichův dům</h1>
      <h2 class="text-xl text-primary-400 mb-2">{@pricelist_name}</h2>
      <p class="text-xs text-primary-400">
        Platný od {Calendar.strftime(@generated_at, "%d. %m. %Y")}
      </p>
    </div>
```

Great! So the user wants a simple solution:
1. One-time selection each time they want to print
2. Modify the current `/admin/pricelists/print` page
3. Keep the current "print all" as default
4. No saved configurations - just one-off selections
5. Only accessible from admin section (already the case)

So I need to:
1. Add a category selection UI to the printable page
2. Allow multiple category selection (checkboxes probably)
3. Have "Select All" as the default
4. Optional: Add a name field for the pricelist (like "Wine List", "Spirits") that appears on the printed page
5. Update the LiveView to handle the category filtering
6. Update the query to filter by selected categories

Let me plan the implementation:

**LiveView changes:**
- Add `selected_category_ids` to the socket assigns (default: all categories)
- Add a `pricelist_name` assign (optional, default to "Ceník")
- Add a form to select categories
- Update the handle_event to handle category selection changes
- Filter pricelists based on selected categories

**Template changes:**
- Add a UI section (hidden on print) for category selection
- Add checkboxes for each category
- Add a text input for custom pricelist name
- Show the custom name in the header when printing

Let me implement this step by step.

```
  @impl true
  def handle_event("toggle_category", %{"category-id" => category_id_str}, socket) do
    category_id = 
      case Integer.parse(category_id_str) do
        {id, _} -> id
        :error -> String.to_integer(category_id_str)
      end
    
    selected_ids =
      if category_id in socket.assigns.selected_category_ids do
        List.delete(socket.assigns.selected_category_ids, category_id)
      else
        [category_id | socket.assigns.selected_category_ids]
      end
    
    pricelists_by_category = Catalog.get_active_pricelists_for_print(selected_ids)
    
    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:selected_category_ids, selected_ids)
     |> assign(:pricelists_by_category, pricelists_by_category)}
  end
```

```heex
<input
  type="text"
  name="pricelist_name"
  value={@pricelist_name}
  phx-change="update_name"
  placeholder="např. Vinný lístek, Destiláty..."

/>
```

The issue is that `phx-change` on a single input requires the input to have a `name` attribute, and Phoenix will send the event with the form structure. But since this is a standalone input (not in a form), I need to use `phx-blur` or `phx-keyup` events, or I need to wrap it in a form.

Actually, looking more carefully, the `phx-change` on a single input element should work, but the params structure might be wrong. When you use `phx-change` on an input with `name="pricelist_name"`, the params will be `%{"pricelist_name" => value}`, not `%{"name" => value}`.

Let me check the handle_event:

```elixir
def handle_event("update_name", %{"name" => name}, socket) do
  {:noreply, assign(socket, :pricelist_name, name)}
end
```

Yes! That's the issue. The param key should be "pricelist_name", not "name".

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

</details></think>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

The user says that when changing the name in the form, they can't see any events firing. This means the `phx-change` event is not triggering. Let me check the template to see how the input is set up.

Looking at the template code I modified earlier, I have:
```heex
<input
  type="text"
  name="pricelist_name"
  value={@pricelist_name}
  phx-change="update_name"
  placeholder="např. Vinný lístek, Destiláty..."
  class="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-secondary-300 rounded-md shadow-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-tertiary-500 focus:border-tertiary-500"
/>
```

The issue is that `phx-change` on a standalone input needs the input to be wrapped in a form, OR we need to use `phx-keyup` or `phx-blur` instead. When you use `phx-change` on an input outside a form, it won't fire.

We have a few options:
1. Wrap the input in a form
2. Use `phx-keyup` instead (fires on each keystroke)
3. Use `phx-blur` (fires when input loses focus)

The cleanest solution is to wrap it in a form element. Let me check the template again and fix this.

The user wants to adjust the print layout so that when content exceeds A4 height, the two-column layout is applied. Currently, the CSS has a max-height of 2000px for the columns, and in print it's 1800px. I need to adjust this to match A4 paper height standards.

A4 paper dimensions:
- Width: 210mm (8.27 inches)
- Height: 297mm (11.69 inches)

In print, with margins of 1.5cm on each side:
- Available height: 297mm - 3cm = 267mm = ~10.5 inches = ~1008px at 96 DPI

Let me check the current file and update the max-height values to be more appropriate for A4 paper.
